error_signature: invite emails contain incorrect port in URL
title: Incorrect port in invite email URLs with Nginx reverse proxy
symptom: Invite emails sent from n8n contain the incorrect port ':5678' in the URL, making them unusable externally.
applies_when: Using n8n with Nginx reverse proxy
not_this_if: Invite emails are sent without a reverse proxy
URLs are generated correctly without the port
root_cause: The issue arises from an incorrect environment variable configuration in n8n. The variable for the webhook URL was set incorrectly, causing the generated invite links to include the internal port instead of the public-facing URL.
fix_steps: Change the environment variable from 'N8N_WEBHOOK_URL=https://my-domain.com/n8n' to 'WEBHOOK_URL=https://my-domain.com/n8n'
Restart the n8n container to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Update the webhook URL environment variable and restart the n8n container.
